quests.name: Daily Warband Slayer: Embercrawlers
quests.description: Embercrawlers boil out of the Emberdeep passages. Burn them back.

quests.name: Daily Warband Slayer: Magma Hounds
quests.description: Magma hounds prowl the magma flow. Put down the pack.

quests.name: Daily Warband Slayer: Cinder Wraiths
quests.description: Cinder wraiths drift through the Cinder Reaches. Dispel them.

quests.name: Daily Warband Slayer: Void Wraiths
quests.description: Void wraiths bleed from the lightless expanse. Banish them.

quests.name: Daily Warband Slayer: Marrow-gluttons
quests.description: Marrow-gluttons feast in the necrotic garden. Starve the bloom.
